mapper.insert: INSERT INTO csdo_header ( id, doc_no, cso_id, cso_doc_no, company, store, customer_code, customer_branch, customer_email, require_generate_cdo, shipping_mode, transporter, status, created_by, released_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{docNo}, #{csoId}, #{csoDocNo}, #{company}, #{store}, #{customerCode}, #{customerBranch}, #{customerEmail}, #{requireGenerateCdo}, #{shippingMode}, #{transporter}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{releasedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO csdo_detail (id, csdo_id, item_code, qty, uom) VALUES (#{id}, #{csdoId}, #{itemCode}, #{qty}, #{uom})
mapper.select: SELECT id, doc_no, cso_id, cso_doc_no, company, store, customer_code, customer_branch, customer_email, require_generate_cdo, shipping_mode, transporter, status, created_by, released_at, created_at, updated_at FROM csdo_header WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, doc_no, cso_id, cso_doc_no, company, store, customer_code, customer_branch, customer_email, require_generate_cdo, shipping_mode, transporter, status, created_by, released_at, created_at, updated_at FROM csdo_header WHERE cso_id = #{csoId}

SELECT id, doc_no, cso_id, cso_doc_no, company, store, customer_code, customer_branch, customer_email, require_generate_cdo, shipping_mode, transporter, status, created_by, released_at, created_at, updated_at FROM csdo_header ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT h.id, h.doc_no, h.cso_id, h.cso_doc_no, h.company, h.store, h.customer_code, h.customer_branch, h.customer_email, h.require_generate_cdo, h.shipping_mode, h.transporter, h.status, h.created_by, h.released_at, h.created_at, h.updated_at FROM csdo_header h LEFT JOIN csdo_detail d ON d.csdo_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{customerCode} IS NULL OR h.customer_code = #{customerCode}) AND (#{createdMethod} IS NULL OR h.doc_no LIKE CONCAT(#{createdMethod}, '%')) AND (#{referenceNo} IS NULL OR h.cso_doc_no = #{referenceNo}) AND (#{itemCode} IS NULL OR d.item_code = #{itemCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
SELECT id, csdo_id, item_code, qty, uom FROM csdo_detail WHERE csdo_id = #{csdoId} ORDER BY item_code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE csdo_header SET status = #{status}, released_at = #{releasedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
